\tzpentry{ID4749}{Coupled Quantum Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4749 introduces Coupled Quantum Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\t\\hat{H}_{\\text{p-gate}} = -\\frac{\\hbar^2}{2m_p} \\nabla^2 + V_{\\text{pH}}(\\ManifoldL) \\otimes \\sum_{i} \\delta(\\mathbf{r} - \\mathbf{r}_i) \\hat{a}_i^{\\dagger}\\hat{a}_i\n\\end{equation}
